items.title: AI can screen 15 million molecules in a day. It still can’t cure Alzheimer’s.
items.title_original: AI can screen 15 million molecules in a day. It still can’t cure Alzheimer’s.
items.title_en: AI can screen 15 million molecules in a day. It still can’t cure Alzheimer’s.
items.title_zh: AI一天可以筛选1500万个分子。它仍然无法治愈阿尔茨海默氏症。
items.title_bilingual: AI一天可以筛选1500万个分子。它仍然无法治愈阿尔茨海默氏症。 / AI can screen 15 million molecules in a day. It still can’t cure Alzheimer’s.

items.title: How AI is transforming golf: optimizing course operations, virtual assistants handling tee time bookings, and AI instructor apps improving player performance (Bradley S. Klein/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_en: How AI is transforming golf: optimizing course operations, virtual assistants handling tee time bookings, and AI instructor apps improving player performance (Bradley S. Klein/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何改变高尔夫：优化球场运营、处理开球时间预订的虚拟助理以及提高球员表现的人工智能教练应用程序（Bradley S. Klein/华尔街日报）

items.title: Court filing: OpenAI says Elon Musk's recent amendments to his OpenAI lawsuit are a "legal ambush", calling them "legally improper and factually unsupported" (Robert Burnson/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Court filing: OpenAI says Elon Musk's recent amendments to his OpenAI lawsuit are a "legal ambush", calling them "legally improper and factually unsupported" (Robert Burnson/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Court filing: OpenAI says Elon Musk's recent amendments to his OpenAI lawsuit are a "legal ambush", calling them "legally improper and factually unsupported" (Robert Burnson/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 法庭文件：OpenAI 表示埃隆·马斯克最近对其 OpenAI 诉讼的修改是一次“法律伏击”，称其“在法律上不正当且事实上不受支持”（罗伯特·伯恩森/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 法庭文件：OpenAI 表示埃隆·马斯克最近对其 OpenAI 诉讼的修改是一次“法律伏击”，称其“在法律上不正当且事实上不受支持”（罗伯特·伯恩森/彭博社） / Court filing: OpenAI says Elon Musk's recent amendments to his OpenAI lawsuit are a "legal ambush", calling them "legally improper and factually unsupported" (Robert Burnson/Bloomberg)

items.title: Ramp data: 30.6% of US businesses paid for Anthropic's tools in March, up from 24.4% in February; OpenAI's US business adoption remained nearly flat MoM at ~35% (Clara Murray/Financial Times)
items.title_original: Ramp data: 30.6% of US businesses paid for Anthropic's tools in March, up from 24.4% in February; OpenAI's US business adoption remained nearly flat MoM at ~35% (Clara Murray/Financial Times)
items.title_en: Ramp data: 30.6% of US businesses paid for Anthropic's tools in March, up from 24.4% in February; OpenAI's US business adoption remained nearly flat MoM at ~35% (Clara Murray/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 斜坡数据：3 月份，30.6% 的美国企业为 Anthropic 的工具付费，高于 2 月份的 24.4%； OpenAI 在美国的业务采用率与环比持平，约为 35%（Clara Murray/《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 斜坡数据：3 月份，30.6% 的美国企业为 Anthropic 的工具付费，高于 2 月份的 24.4%； OpenAI 在美国的业务采用率与环比持平，约为 35%（Clara Murray/《金融时报》） / Ramp data: 30.6% of US businesses paid for Anthropic's tools in March, up from 24.4% in February; OpenAI's US business adoption remained nearly flat MoM at ~35% (Clara Murray/Financial Times)

items.title: Indian IT giant TCS reports Q4 sales up 9.7% YoY to $7.63B, net profit up 12.2% to $1.48B, both above est., and says new AI models did not hurt services demand (Reuters)
items.title_original: Indian IT giant TCS reports Q4 sales up 9.7% YoY to $7.63B, net profit up 12.2% to $1.48B, both above est., and says new AI models did not hurt services demand (Reuters)
items.title_en: Indian IT giant TCS reports Q4 sales up 9.7% YoY to $7.63B, net profit up 12.2% to $1.48B, both above est., and says new AI models did not hurt services demand (Reuters)
items.title_zh: 印度 IT 巨头 TCS 报告称，第四季度销售额同比增长 9.7% 至 $7.63B，净利润增长 12.2% 至 $1.48B，均高于预期，并表示新的 AI 模型并未损害服务需求（路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 印度 IT 巨头 TCS 报告称，第四季度销售额同比增长 9.7% 至 $7.63B，净利润增长 12.2% 至 $1.48B，均高于预期，并表示新的 AI 模型并未损害服务需求（路透社） / Indian IT giant TCS reports Q4 sales up 9.7% YoY to $7.63B, net profit up 12.2% to $1.48B, both above est., and says new AI models did not hurt services demand (Reuters)

items.title: UK activist investor Palliser has built a stake in Ajinomoto, urging it to raise prices for its ABF, a key material used to form advanced chipmaking substrates (Yang Jie/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: UK activist investor Palliser has built a stake in Ajinomoto, urging it to raise prices for its ABF, a key material used to form advanced chipmaking substrates (Yang Jie/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: UK activist investor Palliser has built a stake in Ajinomoto, urging it to raise prices for its ABF, a key material used to form advanced chipmaking substrates (Yang Jie/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: 英国维权投资者 Palliser 入股了 Ajinomoto，敦促其提高 ABF 的价格，ABF 是用于形成先进芯片制造基板的关键材料（Yang Jie/华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: 英国维权投资者 Palliser 入股了 Ajinomoto，敦促其提高 ABF 的价格，ABF 是用于形成先进芯片制造基板的关键材料（Yang Jie/华尔街日报） / UK activist investor Palliser has built a stake in Ajinomoto, urging it to raise prices for its ABF, a key material used to form advanced chipmaking substrates (Yang Jie/Wall Street Journal)

items.title: Alat, a $100B Saudi Arabia PIF-backed electronics manufacturing fund, has removed CEO Amit Midha; sources say it has dropped plans to invest in chip production (Matthew Martin/Semafor)
items.title_original: Alat, a $100B Saudi Arabia PIF-backed electronics manufacturing fund, has removed CEO Amit Midha; sources say it has dropped plans to invest in chip production (Matthew Martin/Semafor)
items.title_en: Alat, a $100B Saudi Arabia PIF-backed electronics manufacturing fund, has removed CEO Amit Midha; sources say it has dropped plans to invest in chip production (Matthew Martin/Semafor)
items.title_zh: Alat 是一家由沙特阿拉伯 PIF 支持的 100B 美元电子制造基金，该基金已解除首席执行官 Amit Midha 的职务；消息人士称，该公司已放弃投资芯片生产的计划（Matthew Martin/Semafor）
items.title_bilingual: Alat 是一家由沙特阿拉伯 PIF 支持的 100B 美元电子制造基金，该基金已解除首席执行官 Amit Midha 的职务；消息人士称，该公司已放弃投资芯片生产的计划（Matthew Martin/Semafor） / Alat, a $100B Saudi Arabia PIF-backed electronics manufacturing fund, has removed CEO Amit Midha; sources say it has dropped plans to invest in chip production (Matthew Martin/Semafor)

items.title: OpenAI says a GitHub workflow used to sign its macOS apps downloaded a malicious Axios library on March 31, but no user data or internal system was compromised (Sam Sabin/Axios)
items.title_original: OpenAI says a GitHub workflow used to sign its macOS apps downloaded a malicious Axios library on March 31, but no user data or internal system was compromised (Sam Sabin/Axios)
items.title_en: OpenAI says a GitHub workflow used to sign its macOS apps downloaded a malicious Axios library on March 31, but no user data or internal system was compromised (Sam Sabin/Axios)
items.title_zh: OpenAI 表示，用于签署 macOS 应用程序的 GitHub 工作流程于 3 月 31 日下载了恶意 Axios 库，但没有用户数据或内部系统受到损害（Sam Sabin/Axios）
items.title_bilingual: OpenAI 表示，用于签署 macOS 应用程序的 GitHub 工作流程于 3 月 31 日下载了恶意 Axios 库，但没有用户数据或内部系统受到损害（Sam Sabin/Axios） / OpenAI says a GitHub workflow used to sign its macOS apps downloaded a malicious Axios library on March 31, but no user data or internal system was compromised (Sam Sabin/Axios)
